questions.context_sentence: How do we keep fit?
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：费特（太胖了费特，所以要fit保持健康）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'fit' mean in this unit?

questions.context_sentence: This year, my goal is to be really fit.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：费特（太胖了费特，所以要fit保持健康）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Running every morning helps me to keep ____.

questions.context_sentence: Write the sports items in the box under the pictures. baseball
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：base(基础/垒) + ball(球) -> 打垒的球 -> 棒球
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “棒球”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: Whose baseball glove is it?
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：在love（爱）前面加g（给），用手套给你带来温暖的爱。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: You need a baseball ____ to catch the ball.

questions.context_sentence: exercise mat
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：迈特（迈着特别的步伐走在运动垫子上）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is an 'exercise mat' used for?

questions.context_sentence: jump rope
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：肉铺（肉铺里挂着用粗绳子拴着的肉）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “绳子”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: Whose tennis racket is it?
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：rack(架子) + -et(小的后缀) -> 小架子一样的网 -> 球拍
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I can't play tennis because I forgot my ____.

questions.context_sentence: Emma: Hardly ever.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：hard(困难地) + -ly -> 困难到几乎不可能发生 -> 几乎不
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'hardly' mean?

questions.context_sentence: Emma: Hardly ever.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：把never(从不)的n拿掉，就变成了在任何时候(ever)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “曾经；在任何时候”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: Emma: Hardly ever.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：hardly(几乎不) + ever(曾经) -> 几乎曾经没有过 -> 几乎从不
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: He ____ watches TV because he is very busy.

questions.context_sentence: Peter: once or twice at weekends
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：由数字one演变而来，表示一次。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'once' mean?

questions.context_sentence: Peter: once or twice at weekends
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：以tw-开头，和two(二)同源，表示两次。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “两次”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: No, it isn't mine.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：my(我的)的绝对物主代词形式，表示“我的东西”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: This isn't my bat. Is it ____?

questions.context_sentence: No, hers is at home.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：her(她的) + s(名词性物主代词后缀) -> 她的东西
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the meaning of 'hers'?

questions.context_sentence: Maybe it's Yaming's.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：合成词 may(可能) + be(是) -> 也许是
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “也许；可能”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: Your bat looks well-used.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：合成词 well(好地/充分地) + used(被使用的) -> 使用得多的
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The book looks ____ because he reads it every day.

questions.context_sentence: Well, practice makes perfect.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：扑克提示（玩扑克需要提示来多加practice练习）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____ makes perfect.

questions.context_sentence: Well, practice makes perfect.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：per-(完全) + fect(做) -> 做到完全的程度 -> 完美的
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'perfect' mean?

questions.context_sentence: I seldom do, but I often play badminton.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：很少(seldom)出售(sell)它们(them)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “很少；不常”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: I seldom do, but I often play badminton.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：白打明顿（白白打了一顿羽毛球）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I like playing ____ with my friends at the weekend.

questions.context_sentence: We should all play doubles sometime!
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：dou-(表示二的词根) -> 变成双倍的
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'doubles' mean in sports?

questions.context_sentence: We should all play doubles sometime!
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：合成词 some(某个) + time(时间) -> 在某个时候
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “在某个时候”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: volleyball
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：合成词 volley(凌空截击) + ball(球) -> 截击不让球落地的运动 -> 排球
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The girls are playing ____ in the gym.

questions.context_sentence: No, they're not theirs.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：their(他们的) + s(名词性物主代词后缀) -> 他们的东西
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'theirs' mean?

questions.context_sentence: go swimming/jogging/...
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：赵哥（赵哥每天早上都在jog慢跑）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I often go ____ in the park in the morning.

questions.context_sentence: a few times
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：加上了a就代表肯定，有“几个”，比few(几乎没有)要多一点。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “几个；一些（肯定的）”对应的英文短语是？

questions.context_sentence: Excuse me, is this your ...?
questions.hint: 情境记忆法：打扰别人或引起注意时的常用礼貌用语。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____, can you tell me the way to the park?

questions.context_sentence: Yours are right here. Mine are over there.
questions.hint: 方位联想法：over(跨越过去) + there(那里) -> 距离较远的“那边”
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'over there' mean?

questions.context_sentence: It looks just like mine!
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：就（just）是正好这样！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: This T-shirt is ____ my size.

questions.context_sentence: Who does this T-shirt belong to?
questions.hint: 搭配记忆法：belong后固定接介词to来引出所有者。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “属于”对应的英文短语是？

questions.context_sentence: I seldom jog in the afternoon on working days because I'm busy then.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：工作(working)的每一天(day) -> 工作日
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is a 'working day'?

questions.context_sentence: I'm always full of energy after jogging.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：容器装满(full)了某种东西(of) -> 充满
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The room is ____ people.

questions.context_sentence: I'm always full of energy after jogging.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：en-(在里面) + erg(工作) + -y(名词后缀) -> 在体内支撑工作的源泉 -> 能量/精力
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “精力；能量”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: In our group, many students like to do sport and exercise.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：骨肉铺（骨肉铺前面聚集了一大“群”人）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'group' mean?

questions.context_sentence: My skateboard is really cool, and so are theirs.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：组合词 skate(滑冰/滑行) + board(板) -> 可以滑行的板 -> 滑板
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “滑板”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: We encourage one another to do tricks.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：en-(使...) + courage(勇气) -> 使人有勇气 -> 鼓励
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: My teachers always ____ me to try my best.

questions.context_sentence: We encourage one another to do tricks.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：吹客（变戏法的人在台上吹嘘自己的trick技巧）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'trick' mean in the context of sports?

questions.context_sentence: Some tricks are difficult, but once you succeed, you feel great!
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：suc-(在下面/向下) + ceed(走) -> 一直往下走坚持到底 -> 就会成功
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: If you work hard, you will ____.

questions.context_sentence: This year, my goal is to be really fit.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：够（跳一跳就能够得着的东西，就是你的goal目标）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “目标；目的”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: But my favourite way of keeping fit is to use an exercise app to work out.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：在健身房通过work(努力练习)把汗水排out(出来) -> 锻炼身体
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I like to ____ in the gym three times a week.

questions.context_sentence: It can show my progress.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：pro-(向前) + gress(走) -> 不断向前走 -> 进步
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'progress'?

questions.context_sentence: We play many matches.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：卖车（比赛赢了奖品可以去卖车）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Did you watch the football ____ last night?

questions.context_sentence: The other teams are great, but I think ours is the best!
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：替木（替木头人组队去参赛）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “队；组”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: We work as a team, and we win or lose as a team.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：路子（比赛用错了路子，自然就会lose输掉）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We hope we won't ____ the game.

questions.context_sentence: A website wants to learn more about how teenagers keep fit.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：teen(后缀-teen表示十几) + age(年龄) + -er(人) -> 年龄在十几岁的人 -> 青少年
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: A 'teenager' is a person aged ____.

questions.context_sentence: Swimming is good for me because it keeps me healthy.
questions.hint: 反义词联想法：be good for (对...有益) 对应 be bad for (对...有害)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Eating vegetables is ____ your health.

questions.context_sentence: Find out which is the most popular sport or exercise...
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：通过寻找(find)最终让真相水落石出(out) -> 查明事实。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We need to ____ the truth.

questions.context_sentence: But we should try our best to exercise every day.
questions.hint: 搭配记忆法：try one's best (尽某人最大努力)，在这里物主代词替换为our。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “尽我们最大努力”对应的英文短语是？

questions.context_sentence: When we play a sport with others, we can even make new friends.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：制造(make)出新的友谊，即交朋友(friends要用复数)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It's easy for him to ____ with others.

questions.context_sentence: Our brain gets more oxygen because of this...
questions.hint: 词性对比法：because(连词，后接句子) vs because of (介词短语，后接名词/代词)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We stayed at home ____ the heavy rain.
